forecast.name: Tonight

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 83. West wind around 6 mph.

weather_report:
Tonight in Boston, the sky stretches clear, a tranquil canvas spangled with the quiet glow of city lights against the velvety background. As the west wind whispers gently through the evening, temperatures settle into a comfortable embrace around 59 degrees, inviting you to partake in the serene ambiance of the night. It is a moment well-suited for leisurely strolls along the waterfront or perhaps finding a cozy nook outside to sip a favorite beverage while the world slows down around you.

As dawn breaks and warmth nudges the day awake, Monday promises sunshine and a delightful high near 83 degrees. Expect the breezy whispers of the west wind to continue, creating a perfect backdrop for a day filled with potential. Dressing in light layers will serve you well, balancing comfort and style as you venture out to explore. A visit to a local park or a leisurely bike ride along the esplanade would blend seamlessly with the gentle warmth, allowing you to savor the sweet essence of summer.
